name: Baked Rigatoni
recipeInstructions:
To make the sauce: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a pot, heat olive oil and sauté garlic, onions, and hot-pepper flakes until golden.
Stir in tomato paste. Rinse can with water and add to pot. Simmer for 30 minutes.
Add all remaining ingredients. Simmer for at least 1-1/2 to 2 hours. If time allows, let it simmer longer.
To make the filling: Combine ricotta, pepper, parsley, and eggs in a medium bowl. Mix thoroughly. Set aside cheeses.
To assemble the casserole: Cook rigatoni according to package directions, reducing cooking time by two minutes. Do not overcook.
Spread sauce over the bottom of a 9x13x2-inch baking dish. Top with a layer of pasta. Place another layer of sauce, then several spoonfuls of ricotta mixture on top using the back of a large spoon.
Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top. Add another layer of pasta and repeat process, ending with Parmesan this time. Repeat until topped with mozzarella, etc.
Finish by adding a final layer of pasta.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until it begins to bubble around the edges (about 15 minutes). Ricotta should be slightly set. Allow to stand 10-15 minutes before serving. Serves six to eight.
